hooks.command: gh run list --workflow=ci.yml --branch=main --limit=1 --json conclusion,databaseId,displayTitle --jq '.[] | select(.conclusion == "failure") | "⚠️ CI is RED on main. Latest failure: \"\(.displayTitle)\" (run \(.databaseId)). Inspect with: gh run view \(.databaseId) --log-failed | tail -50"' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in cd\ *|cd\"*|cd\/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not use cd prefix. The working directory is already the project root. Run commands directly."}'; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac; }
